tasks.subject: Task 0: Packaging (hud subpackage + textual extra + console script)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create agentic_mcp.hud package + textual optional extra + agentic-hud console script; import agentic_mcp must not import textual.

**Files:** Create src/agentic_mcp/hud/__init__.py; Modify pyproject.toml; Test tests/test_hud_packaging.py

**Verify:** ./.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m pytest tests/test_hud_packaging.py -q

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mcp-server/src/agentic_mcp/hud/__init__.py", "mcp-server/pyproject.toml", "mcp-server/tests/test_hud_packaging.py"], "verifyCommand": "./.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m pytest tests/test_hud_packaging.py -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["import agentic_mcp does not import textual", "hud extra + agentic-hud script declared"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: view_models.py (pure render models)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pure Textual-free dataclasses + functions (board_view, signals_view, task_sheet_view, overview_counts) built on existing read helpers.

**Files:** Create src/agentic_mcp/hud/view_models.py; Test tests/test_hud_view_models.py

**Verify:** ./.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m pytest tests/test_hud_view_models.py -q

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mcp-server/src/agentic_mcp/hud/view_models.py", "mcp-server/tests/test_hud_view_models.py"], "verifyCommand": "./.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m pytest tests/test_hud_view_models.py -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["board_view tree+levels", "signals_view degrades empty", "task_sheet_view full sheet", "overview_counts gated+escalation"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: graph_source.py (read-only conn + data_version probe)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Per-project GraphSource: one persistent read-only (mode=ro, NOT via db.connect to avoid migration writes) connection + PRAGMA data_version change probe.

**Files:** Create src/agentic_mcp/hud/graph_source.py; Test tests/test_hud_graph_source.py

**Verify:** ./.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m pytest tests/test_hud_graph_source.py -q

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mcp-server/src/agentic_mcp/hud/graph_source.py", "mcp-server/tests/test_hud_graph_source.py"], "verifyCommand": "./.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m pytest tests/test_hud_graph_source.py -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["read-only mode=ro", "changed() flips once", "write raises", "missing DB raises"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: daemon_client.py (loopback control + offline sentinel)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** DaemonClient wrapping rung-1 control API; DAEMON_OFFLINE sentinel on any failure; no approve/decline/retry.

**Files:** Create src/agentic_mcp/hud/daemon_client.py; Test tests/test_hud_daemon_client.py

**Verify:** ./.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m pytest tests/test_hud_daemon_client.py -q

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mcp-server/src/agentic_mcp/hud/daemon_client.py", "mcp-server/tests/test_hud_daemon_client.py"], "verifyCommand": "./.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m pytest tests/test_hud_daemon_client.py -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["port resolution", "live snapshot/run", "offline sentinel no-raise", "no gate methods"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Textual app + screens + refresh worker + launch context
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Thin Textual layer: AgenticHUD app, OverviewScreen + WorkspaceScreen, single 1.5s thread-worker refresh, __main__ launch-context resolution.

**Files:** Create src/agentic_mcp/hud/{screens.py,app.py,__main__.py}; Test tests/test_hud_app.py (Pilot, async)

**Verify:** ./.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m pytest tests/test_hud_app.py -q

Implementer note: targets textual>=0.80; adapt widget construction (not structure) to pinned version if a symbol moved.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mcp-server/src/agentic_mcp/hud/screens.py", "mcp-server/src/agentic_mcp/hud/app.py", "mcp-server/src/agentic_mcp/hud/__main__.py", "mcp-server/tests/test_hud_app.py"], "verifyCommand": "./.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m pytest tests/test_hud_app.py -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["launch context", "board+filter", "offline degradation", "control wiring", "single timer worker"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: task_sheet.py (read-only drill-in modal)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** TaskSheet ModalScreen rendering task_sheet_view; rung-3 Approve/Decline/Retry buttons present but disabled; wire activation from WorkspaceScreen.

**Files:** Create src/agentic_mcp/hud/task_sheet.py; Modify src/agentic_mcp/hud/screens.py; Test tests/test_hud_app.py (extend)

**Verify:** ./.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m pytest -m "not llm" -q

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mcp-server/src/agentic_mcp/hud/task_sheet.py", "mcp-server/src/agentic_mcp/hud/screens.py", "mcp-server/tests/test_hud_app.py"], "verifyCommand": "./.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m pytest -m \"not llm\" -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["activation pushes sheet", "renders sheet", "gate buttons disabled", "no regressions"]}
```
